# Contributing to Fylox Protocol

First of all, thank you for your interest in contributing to **Fylox Protocol**. 🚀

Fylox is building real-world financial infrastructure for the global Pi Network ecosystem.

Our mission is simple:

Make it possible to spend Pi anywhere in the real world.

We believe the future of decentralized finance will be driven by real utility, open collaboration, and global communities. If you're a builder, designer, or innovator — you're in the right place.

---

# Our Philosophy

Fylox is an open infrastructure project.

We welcome contributions from pioneers, developers, designers, and builders around the world who want to help create real-world use cases for Pi.

We value:

• Simplicity  
• Transparency  
• Clean code  
• Community collaboration  
• Real-world impact  

---

# How to Contribute

1. Fork this repository

2. Create a new branch

git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name

3. Commit your changes

git commit -m "Add: short description of your change"

4. Push to your branch

git push origin feature/your-feature-name

5. Open a Pull Request

A maintainer will review your contribution.

---

# Development Setup

Fylox is intentionally lightweight and easy to contribute to.

Tech stack:

HTML  
TailwindCSS  
Vanilla JavaScript  
Pi SDK

No complex setup is required.

You can simply open index.html in any browser or in Pi Browser to preview the app.

All changes are deployed instantly using GitHub Pages.

---

# Code Style Guidelines

To keep the project clean and maintainable:

• Write semantic HTML  
• Use Tailwind utilities instead of custom CSS when possible  
• Keep JavaScript modular and readable  
• Avoid unnecessary dependencies  
• Comment complex logic when needed

Clean code makes the project easier for everyone to build on.

---

# Reporting Issues

If you find a bug or want to suggest a feature:

1. Check existing issues first  
2. Provide a clear description  
3. Include screenshots or reproduction steps if possible

Good reports help us fix problems faster.

---

# Security

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it privately instead of opening a public issue.

Security matters when building financial infrastructure.

---

# Community

The fastest way to connect with the team is on X:

@FyloxProtocol

We welcome feedback, ideas, and collaboration from pioneers all over the world.

---

# Final Note

Fylox is being built for the global community of Pi Pioneers.

Made with ❤️ for the future of decentralized payments.

Let's build the real-world economy for Pi together.
